endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.StreamAnalytics/streamingjobs/{jobName}/inputs
endpoints.description: Lists all of the inputs under the specified streaming job.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{JOBNAME}} with a real jobname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.StreamAnalytics/streamingjobs/{jobName}/inputs/{inputName}
endpoints.description: Gets details about the specified input.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{JOBNAME}} with a real jobname. Replace {{INPUTNAME}} with a real inputname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.StreamAnalytics/streamingjobs/{jobName}/inputs/{inputName}
endpoints.description: Creates an input or replaces an already existing input under an existing streaming job.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{JOBNAME}} with a real jobname. Replace {{INPUTNAME}} with a real inputname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.StreamAnalytics/streamingjobs/{jobName}/inputs/{inputName}
endpoints.description: Deletes an input from the streaming job.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{JOBNAME}} with a real jobname. Replace {{INPUTNAME}} with a real inputname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: PATCH /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.StreamAnalytics/streamingjobs/{jobName}/inputs/{inputName}
endpoints.description: Updates an existing input under an existing streaming job. This can be used to partially update (ie. update one or two properties) an input without affecting the rest the job or input definition.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{JOBNAME}} with a real jobname. Replace {{INPUTNAME}} with a real inputname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.StreamAnalytics/streamingjobs/{jobName}/inputs/{inputName}/test
endpoints.description: Tests whether an input’s datasource is reachable and usable by the Azure Stream Analytics service.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{JOBNAME}} with a real jobname. Replace {{INPUTNAME}} with a real inputname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.
